metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 77.jpg in Documents > Task 77 folder on Photos app. Turn down the brightness to -1.
metadata.context: The default brightness setting of The Eiffel Tower photo is too high

l3.rationale: Win key opens the Start/launcher window from the desktop.

l4.rationale: Used Run and File Explorer to reach Documents > Task 77 and open Task 77.jpg.

l5.rationale: Covers launching Photos, navigating/searching through Documents > Task 77, and confirming the selected Task ID 77.jpg so the image is opened.
